strategies.name: Logical-RHS Reassociation (No Symmetric TryFold)
strategies.target: Mutate range_fold_mixed.ll or logical-select.ll so outer logical op is select(cond, true/false, tree) where tree is one-level (cmpA && cmpB) or (cmpA || cmpB).
strategies.rationale: foldBooleanAndOr only calls the swapped TryFold(RHS, LHS) when IsLogical is false. In logical select form, if the reassociated tree is on RHS and standalone icmp is on LHS, the new fold path is not attempted.
strategies.expected_issue: Missed fold: no range-check combine happens, leaving nested selects/logic unchanged.

strategies.name: Logical Operand-Position Sensitivity
strategies.target: Create select i1 cmp_inner, i1 other_bool, i1 false (or select i1 cmp_inner, i1 true, i1 other_bool) combined with another range-icmp.
strategies.rationale: For MatchedLogical, loop skips i==0, so only operand B (select true/false arm) is considered as foldable icmp, not condition A. If foldable compare is in condition position, combine is missed.
strategies.expected_issue: Missed fold for valid one-level reassociation when inner icmp is in logical condition position.

strategies.name: Depth>1 Reassociation Stress
strategies.target: Mutate one-level tests into two-level trees like ((cmp1 && cmp2) && cmp3) and cmp0 && ((cmp1 && cmp2) && other), for bitwise and logical forms.
strategies.rationale: Patch intentionally looks through one level only. Deeper boolean trees may still expose range-fold opportunities but remain unfused.
strategies.expected_issue: Only partial combine or no full range fold through deeper trees.

strategies.name: Vector+Poison Reassociated Logical Fold
strategies.target: Extend vector tests in logical-select.ll / and-or-icmp-const-icmp.ll with reassociated one-level trees plus poison lane constants and icmp samesign.
strategies.rationale: New path matches logical select and rebuilds with CreateLogicalAnd/Or. Vector i1 with poison lanes and samesign icmps is sensitive for poison behavior.
strategies.expected_issue: Potential poison-safety regression or over-conservatism in vector logical form.

strategies.name: Commuted Logical Tree Stability
strategies.target: Create paired tests with swapped logical operands in select form and compare folding outcomes for consistency.
strategies.rationale: Bitwise path tries both directions; logical path tries one direction only. Commuted logical trees may produce inconsistent folding results.
strategies.expected_issue: Order-dependent canonicalization: semantically equivalent commuted logical trees fold differently.

reason_thou:
1. Fix Understanding
The patch extends InstCombine foldBooleanAndOr to fold range-like compare combinations through one level of reassociated boolean and/or. It now recognizes when one operand is a one-level and/or tree containing an inner icmp, folds that inner icmp with the other top-level icmp via foldAndOrOfICmps, then rebuilds the outer boolean expression. It also drops samesign on a produced icmp result.

2. Formal Semantic Modeling
Before: only direct (icmp bop icmp) pairs were folded by foldAndOrOfICmps.
After: patterns of shape ((icmpX bop otherBool) bop icmpY) or logical-select equivalents can fold icmpX bop icmpY first, then reconstruct with otherBool.
Potential divergence point is poison and select short-circuit semantics in logical form.
Concrete example:
Original: ((y >s 65535) && cond) && (y <s 1114112)
Folded: cond && ((y - 65536) u< 1048576)
These are equivalent when transformation preserves logical poison behavior.

3. Assumptions and Preconditions Identified
- One-level reassociation is sufficient for intended real-world patterns.
- Rebuild using CreateLogicalAnd/Or preserves logical select poison behavior.
- Directionality restrictions in logical mode do not drop important canonical cases.
- Dropping samesign on produced compare is sufficient to avoid invalid poison constraints.
- Matching choice of inner operand in logical select form is adequate.

4. Potential Cases to Break Assumptions
- Reassociated tree appears on RHS in logical form; code does not try swapped fold direction.
- Foldable icmp is in select condition position in logical pattern; current loop skips that position.
- Deeper-than-one-level trees require iterative reassociation and may remain unfused.
- Vector i1 and poison lanes may expose subtle poison propagation mismatches.
- Commuted logical forms may fold differently due to asymmetric search and reconstruction.

5. Test Strategies
Use targeted mutations around existing issue-176554 style tests and logical-select tests to probe: directional asymmetry, operand-position asymmetry, deeper nesting limits, vector poison behavior, and commuted-shape stability.
